title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers

title: affaan-m/ECC

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.

title: n8n-io/n8n

title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
summary: 本文介绍如何通过一条命令在Hugging Face Jobs上运行vLLM服务器，简化了部署流程，并提供了快速启动指南。
highlights: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command

title: Which tokens does a hybrid model predict better?
summary: 本文探讨了混合模型在预测不同token时的表现差异，分析了哪些token类型（如高频词、低频词、语法词等）在混合架构下预测更准确，并提供了实验数据和结论。
highlights: 混合模型在预测低频token时表现优于单一模型。
语法功能词（如介词、冠词）的预测准确率提升显著。
实验表明，混合架构能有效结合不同模型的优势。
